plain_english_read: Worth watching, but only for this pattern and horizon.
hypothesis: Some hard regime rejections are already washed out and rebound enough to become research leads.
rule_summary: Match reject rows whose reason references a hard BTC/ETH regime block.

plain_english_read: Positive so far, but needs more examples.
hypothesis: Sharp 4h selloffs that stop falling over the last hour may rebound enough to study as a high-risk setup.
rule_summary: Match non-regime rows with 4h return <= -3% and 1h return better than -0.25%.

plain_english_read: Has not beaten the cost hurdle in this slice.
hypothesis: Coins recovering over 4h but still below their 24h high can offer better entry quality than chasing highs.
rule_summary: Match no-hard-block rows with positive 4h return, negative 24h return, and 1-6% below prior 24h high.

plain_english_read: Has not beaten the cost hurdle in this slice.
hypothesis: The frozen v0 watch state contains early setups that may mature before they become official candidates.
rule_summary: Match historical replay rows where formal_state is paper_watch.

plain_english_read: Has not beaten the cost hurdle in this slice.
hypothesis: The no-signal population establishes the opportunity-cost baseline for doing nothing.
rule_summary: Match historical replay rows where formal_state is no_signal.

plain_english_read: Has not beaten the cost hurdle in this slice.
hypothesis: When BTC/ETH regime is risk-on, high-beta assets with strong 4h momentum may outperform broad BTC/ETH wrappers.
rule_summary: Match risk-on rows with no hard block, positive 1h return, and 4h return above 1%.

plain_english_read: Has not beaten the cost hurdle in this slice.
hypothesis: Coins with positive 1h and 4h momentum near a 24h high outperform after costs when regime is not hard-blocked.
rule_summary: Match non-regime rows with no hard block, positive 1h and 4h returns, and within 1% of prior 24h high.

plain_english_read: Has not beaten the cost hurdle in this slice.
